sacco.gui

Class STextField

  • java.lang.Object

    java.awt.event.KeyListener, java.util.EventListener, SComponent

    SPasswordField

    public class STextField
extends java.lang.Object
implements SComponent, java.awt.event.KeyListener

      • requestFocus

        public void requestFocus()
        Attempts to gain the "Focus" of the window. If successful, the cursor will be placed in the field

      • setEditable

        public void setEditable(boolean b)
        Use this method to set the text field to be editable or not
        Parameters:
        b - true sets it to editable. false sets it to not editable
